ddls:
CREATE TABLE "body_types" (
  "body_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each body type */,
  "body_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the body type */,
  "body_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the body type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("body_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L, XL, XXL) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "body_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the body type */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_body_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("body_type_id") REFERENCES body_types ("body_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the body part measured (e.g., Hips, Thigh U/L, Knee, Calf Straight, Calf Fitted) */,
  "measurement_description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_measurements" (
  "size_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size and measurement combination */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement */,
  "measurement_value" TEXT /* Measurement value for the given size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_categories" (
  "clothing_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing category */,
  "clothing_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category */,
  "clothing_category_description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clothing_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "clothing_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart associated with the item */,
  "clothing_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clothing_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_clothing_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("clothing_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "customer_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer measurement */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement */,
  "measurement_value" TEXT /* Customer's measurement value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "size_recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "clothing_item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "recommended_size_id" INTEGER /* Recommended size for the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_recommended_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_clothing_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("clothing_item_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each body type
Name of the size (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L, XL, XXL)
Name of the body part measured (e.g., Hips, Thigh U/L, Knee, Calf Straight, Calf Fitted)
Unique identifier for each size and measurement combination
Measurement value for the given size
Unique identifier for each clothing category
Unique identifier for each clothing item
Reference to the size chart associated with the item
Unique identifier for each customer measurement
Unique identifier for each size recommendation
